business.name: Makho & Diba Express Plumbing
business.description: Expert plumbing services in Johannesburg. From blocked drains to geyser installations — we show up, we fix it, we care.

metadata.title: Makho & Diba Express Plumbing | Johannesburg Plumbers
metadata.description: Expert plumbing services across Johannesburg. Geyser installations, blocked drains, renovations, CCTV inspections and more. Qualified, reliable, and insured.
metadata.keywords: plumber johannesburg, plumbing services johannesburg, blocked drains johannesburg, geyser installation johannesburg, plumbing maintenance, cctv sewer inspection, certificate of compliance plumbing, bathroom renovation johannesburg, brixton plumber, emergency plumber johannesburg

navigation.whatsappMessage: Hello! I'd like to get a quote for plumbing services.

hero.headline:
Plumbing Done
Right, Every Time.
hero.body: Looking for a trusted plumber? We're here to assist you with all your plumbing needs — from blocked drains to full renovations.

services.title: Renovations
services.description: Transform your home with a professional bathroom and/or kitchen renovation!

services.title: Certificate of Compliance
services.description: We are registered to provide plumbing CoC's according to the municipal regulations.

services.title: Sewer Inspections
services.description: Sewer camera inspections offer precise and accurate diagnostics to identify blockages, damage, and root intrusion.

services.title: Geyser Specialists
services.description: New installations, replacements, maintenance and repairs — we consider ourselves specialists in this area.

services.title: Blocked Drains
services.description: Addressing blocked drains promptly prevents water damage, unpleasant odors, and potential health hazards.

services.title: Plumbing Maintenance
services.description: General plumbing maintenance services are essential for ensuring the reliability, efficiency, and longevity of your plumbing system.

about.heading: A plumbing team on a mission!
about.body: Built on trust and reliability, we deliver professional plumbing solutions to residents and businesses across Johannesburg.

points.title: Founded with Purpose
points.description: Built to provide affordable, quality plumbing to homeowners and businesses — driven by trust and a commitment to getting the job done right.

points.title: Quality Every Time
points.description: From geyser installations to full renovations, we deliver consistent quality on every job — big or small.

points.title: Fast & Professional
points.description: We prioritise rapid response, clear communication, and clean workmanship — because plumbing issues can't wait.

whyChooseUs.title: Qualified & Experienced
whyChooseUs.desc: Certified plumbers with years of hands-on experience.

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & On Time
whyChooseUs.desc: We show up when we say we will — no waiting around.

whyChooseUs.title: Fully Insured
whyChooseUs.desc: Complete peace of mind on every job we undertake.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.desc: Honest quotes with no hidden costs or surprises.

whyChooseUs.title: Emergency Response
whyChooseUs.desc: Fast response when you need us most.

whyChooseUs.title: Service Excellence
whyChooseUs.desc: We're not done until you're completely satisfied.

testimonials.name: Thabo M.
testimonials.content: Makho & Diba fixed our burst geyser faster than I expected. Professional, clean, and fairly priced. Will definitely use them again!

testimonials.name: Sandra P.
testimonials.content: Reliable and thorough. They sorted out a blocked drain issue at our complex that other plumbers couldn't fix. Highly recommended.

testimonials.name: Riaan V.
testimonials.content: Called them for an emergency and they were on site within the hour. Great workmanship and a very professional team. My go-to plumbers from now on.

footer.description: Expert plumbing services across Johannesburg and surrounds. Qualified, reliable, and insured.
